name: TruthMirror
description: An AI-powered geopolitical fact-checking and intelligence synthesis engine. Built on a multi-agent pipeline combining local and cloud LLMs for real-time source triangulation.

name: OnlineSchool
description: A full-featured LMS built on WordPress using LearnPress, Elementor Pro, WooCommerce, and custom plugins. Includes interactive H5P lesson widgets.

name: ColorMixer
description: A self-contained additive RGB color mixing widget built for H5P lesson embedding. Draggable light circles with mix-blend-mode screen compositing.
